title: Marketplace Repository Layer
purpose: Implement backend repository layer for marketplace domain entities. Establish domain-oriented repository interfaces, PostgreSQL persistence adapters, and domain entities that consume shared contracts as the canonical data boundary. Preserve frontend/backend compiler isolation and shared contract authority.
architectural_constraints: Repository interfaces remain in domain layer
PostgreSQL implementations remain in infrastructure layer
Shared contracts are the ONLY data shape authority
No ORM types leak across domain boundaries
Frontend must not import backend repository code
TypeScript strict mode must pass on all surfaces

deliverables.description: Listing domain aggregate with state validation and event emission
IListingRepository interface defining contract for persistence operations
PostgreSQL implementation of IListingRepository with outbox integration
Unit tests for Listing aggregate behavior
Unit tests for PostgreSQL listing repository

acceptance_criteria: Listing aggregate supports create, update, publish, withdraw, and mark-as-sold operations
IListingRepository interface exposes findById, findBySellerId, save, and delete methods
PostgresListingRepository implements IListingRepository using raw SQL
Repository save() persists uncommitted domain events to outbox atomically
All repository methods use shared contract types (ListingResponse, ListingStatus)
No Zod schema redefinition exists in backend marketplace code
npm run typecheck passes with zero errors
npm run typecheck:frontend passes with zero errors
Unit tests pass for Listing aggregate and repository implementation
In-memory adapter passes same test suite as PostgreSQL adapter
